Prairie Rivers UMC District Office - Hispanic/Latino Ministry - Maria Lopez, diversity counselor from CCC, visits with my English students.
Recibimos muchísima información de las clases, becas y apoyo financiero a CCC (Community College) de María López.
Ella es la consejera de la diversidad en Hastings, Grand Island and Columbus.
Muchas gracias, María, por venir a mi clase de inglés y por hacer la presentación.
¡Eres una bendición!
We received so much information about classes, scholarships and financial aid at CCC from María López.
She is the diversity counselor in Hastings, Grand Island and Columbus.
Thank you very much, María, for coming to my English class and for making the presentation.
You are a blessing!

Kick off your festive season with Handel's Messiah in St.Catharines' very own Partridge Hall.
Experience Chorus Niagara's stirring Hallelujah Chorus as heard by over 50 million people on YouTube, and delight in brilliant soloists who thrill with dazzling arias in this holiday classic.
One performance only!
Players: CHORUS NIAGARA, Talisker Players, Jacqueline Woodley, soprano; Stephanie Tritchew, mezzo-soprano; Asitha Tennekoon, tenor; Clarence Frazer, baritone.

Beautiful, modern SOMA Loft embodies the urban live/work lifestyle.
Floor-to-ceiling windows flood the unit with natural light .
Dramatic high ceilings create an artistic studio feel.
Open floor plan with spacious living area opens up to the kitchen with granite countertops and stainless steel appliances.
Convenient half-bath on this level.
2nd level bedroom/bath hovers over the living room, yet feels private.
Shared large roof deck with views of Downtown.This Sternberg Benjamin Designed building sits in the middle of SOMA's trendy new coffee houses, restaurants and shops , 97 Walk Score 100 Transit Score.
In unit laundry & 1 car parking space.

age 30, marriage license to marry Ava Corley, age 20, both of Welch Oklahoma.
